hooks.command: mkdir -p ~/.cache/claude-status && printf '{"status":"blocked","project":"%s","start_time":%s,"pane_id":"%s"}' "${PWD##*/}" "$(date +%s)" "${WEZTERM_PANE:-unknown}" > ~/.cache/claude-status/pane-${WEZTERM_PANE:-unknown}.json && terminal-notifier -title 'Permission Needed' -message "Approve in ${PWD##*/}" -group "$PWD:perm" -sound Basso -execute "[[ -n $WEZTERM_PANE ]] && /opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm

mkdir -p ~/.cache/claude-status && printf '{"status":"waiting","project":"%s","start_time":%s,"pane_id":"%s"}' "${PWD##*/}" "$(date +%s)" "${WEZTERM_PANE:-unknown}" > ~/.cache/claude-status/pane-${WEZTERM_PANE:-unknown}.json && terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Waiting' -message "Needs input in ${PWD##*/}" -group "$PWD:input" -sound Basso -execute "[[ -n $WEZTERM_PANE ]] && /opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm

mkdir -p ~/.cache/claude-status && printf '{"status":"idle","project":"%s","start_time":%s,"pane_id":"%s"}' "${PWD##*/}" "$(date +%s)" "${WEZTERM_PANE:-unknown}" > ~/.cache/claude-status/pane-${WEZTERM_PANE:-unknown}.json && terminal-notifier -title 'Claude Done' -message "Done in ${PWD##*/}" -group "$PWD" -sound default -execute "[[ -n $WEZTERM_PANE ]] && /opt/homebrew/bin/wezterm cli activate-pane --pane-id $WEZTERM_PANE" -activate com.github.wez.wezterm
